titleStmt.title: SII 38.282: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 282. (A.R. No. 282 of 1912.) ŚIVANKŪḌAL, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, central shrine, Śivakoḻunḍēśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. It records that the sabhaiyār of Mulaimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in Maṇaiyiṟ-kōṭṭam (a sub-division of) Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam sold a piece of land to the god Mahādēvar Śivakoḻundāṇḍār temple of Śivankūḍal, after receiving price-money from the temple authorities, for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple. It appears that an individual made this grant to the temple, and a Panmāhēśvara-Bhaṭṭan wrote this deed at the bidding of the sabhā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātuviḷaṅ
va malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi
nnavar Iriyaluṟṟal māta tikkaṉaittum tancakkarana
vanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya � cari vanmarānac
ravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻadeva
[ja]yaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaiyiṟ
teyam mulaimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇakkaiyeḻuttu
civakūṭal ma[hā]devarcivakkoḻun=tāṇṭār Ātidāsan caṇḍeśvaradeva
r pakkal nāṅkaḷ vilaikoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Emmur kiḻai maṭa
tterikiḻ mānat terit tūmpiṟ kālvaḻi nirpāyun=taṭi Iraṇṭināl kuḻi
[ja]ññūṟum viṟpataṟku kiḻpāṟkellaiy vāykālukku meṟku n=tenpāṟkel
lai Ellai vākkālin vaṭakaraikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ellaik kal
lukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṭuṅkalicceṟuvin tenvarampukku teṟkum I
nānkellaikkuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam patinaṟucāṉRead cāṇkolāl kuḻi
m Idevarku Oru tirunan=tāviḷakkuc cantrātittavaṟ Erippatāka kuṭuttom
mulaimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom Ippaṭip paṇikkap paṇiyāl Eḻuti nen panmā
heśvarabhaṭṭanen Ittirunan=tāviḷakku vaittān viḷattūr
Digital edition of SII 38.282 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
